title: Summer Research & Design Assistant (Undergrad / Post-Bac)
unit: NAU Radiant Center for Remote Sensing
summary: We're looking for a motivated undergraduate or post-bac student to join our team this summer (2026). You'll work closely with staff on active projects, contributing to real design and engineering challenges from day one. Ideal candidates are currently enrolled in (or recently completed) a degree in mechanical engineering, physics, or a related field, with hands-on CAD experience (NX, SolidWorks, Fusion 360, or similar). Familiarity with technical drawings, fabrication methods, or prototyping is a plus.
highlights: Create and modify CAD models and drawings in support of ongoing projects, and assist with design iterations, prototyping, and technical documentation.
Collaborate with team members to translate concepts into workable designs and support general lab and project tasks as needed.
To apply, submit your resume and a brief note about your CAD experience to radiant@nau.edu.
